headline: Jim Cramer on Occidental Petroleum: “If the War Ends, That Stock’s Going to Go Down”
summary: Occidental Petroleum Corporation (NYSE:OXY) was among the stocks Jim Cramer highlighted on Mad Money as he noted that the market has an appetite for stocks. Inquiring about the stock, a caller sought Cramer’s take on it, and in response, he said: Okay, at this point, I don’t want to make it sound like I’m pro-war… […]
